title: soup pvp
description: Makes soups instantly drink when right clicked! Used for Soup Pvp
body:
# Soup pvp plugin:

This plugin makes it so Mushroom strew is instantly drinkable when a user right clicks a Mushroom stew in their hotbar.
This plugin can be used to create soup pvp on 1.20.1 servers and bring Soup Pvp back!

This is useful if you want to have soup pvp games or just the feature of instantly being able to drink mushroom stew
